access_token.description: GitLab personal access token or OAuth access token. Used only for Bearer auth; never logged.

base_url.description: GitLab API base URL override, e.g. https://gitlab.example.com/api/v4 for self-managed instances, or for tests/proxies.

start_date.description: RFC3339 lower bound applied as each stream's matching since-filter (last_activity_after for projects, created_after for users, updated_after for issues; groups has no since-filter upstream).

mode.description: Runtime mode: live (default) or fixture for credential-free conformance.
